pricing_tier.quote_span: The base list price per API call is tiered based on monthly call volume, as follows: 0 to 1,000,000 calls: $0.0020 per call; 1,000,001 to 10,000,000 calls: $0.0015 per call; 10,000,001+ calls: $0.0010 per call

discount_threshold.quote_span: where Customer commits in writing to a minimum annual spend of one million dollars ($1,000,000) across the contract year, Provider shall apply an additional discount of twelve percent (12%) off the tier pricing
discount_threshold.annotation_note: Co-occurrence case: a discount_threshold clause stacks on top of an already-tiered pricing_tier clause in the same document. Tests whether the extractor keeps the two clause types separate rather than merging the 12% into the tier unit prices.

renewal_term.quote_span: This Agreement has an Initial Term of twelve (12) months and does not include any renewal or extension mechanism; the parties must execute a new agreement for continued services beyond the Initial Term.
